_note: Content block for /solutions/ecommerce (#605). Use-case page: the partner storefront surface — headless commerce with a custom domain, a Digital Product Passport on every SKU, and channel sync (Instagram/Facebook). Mirrors data/wholesale.json so the page component is symmetric. Lift into the CMS later without changing the component.

hero.title: A storefront that you can own.
hero.subtitle: A headless storefront on a custom domain, pulled from the same rails as production. Every SKU carries a Digital Product Passport that puts provenance on the page.

shift.title: Buyers want the receipt, not the claim.
shift.body: Headless commerce is table stakes; provenance is the new differentiator. EU ESPR and the Digital Product Passport mandate make 'who made this' a required answer on the page. JYT bakes the passport into the product at publish time — the storefront never bolts it on.

steps.title: From published design to a live, branded store.

items.title: Publish from the atelier OS
items.body: A design approved in production becomes a live product — variants, region pricing, and passport minted in one step. No re-keying, no separate PIM.

items.title: Sell on your own domain
items.body: A headless storefront on a custom domain, themed to your label. SEO-friendly, fast, and deployable per partner from the same codebase.

items.title: Show the passport on the page
items.body: Each product page renders its Digital Product Passport — maker, material lot, certifications. Provenance buyers and regulators verify without leaving the store.

items.title: One rail, design to sold
items.body: The same platform that runs production runs your store. No sync drift between PLM, inventory, and the shelf.

items.title: Passport per SKU, native
items.body: EU ESPR-ready Digital Product Passport on every piece — not a separate subscription like standalone provenance tools.

items.title: Sell where buyers are
items.body: Instagram and Facebook catalog sync out of the box, plus a custom-domain storefront for direct demand.

items.title: Headless, so it's yours
items.body: Custom themes, custom domain, your label front and centre. The storefront is a Vercel-deployed Next.js app you can extend.

cta.title: Open a storefront that already knows the story.
cta.body: We'll show you publishing a design to a branded store with a passport on every SKU — live, on your domain.

starter.title: Starters to start your fashion brand.
starter.subtitle: Skip the agency. Pick a starter tuned for fashion — your label name, your palette, your domain — and you're live in an afternoon. Each starter includes a storefront theme, a product catalogue seeded from your atelier, and the admin panel ready to go.

items.title: Your label, live today
items.body: Enter your brand name, pick a palette, connect a domain. The starter deploys a themed Next.js storefront to Vercel in one click.

items.title: Catalogue from the atelier
items.body: Products published in production flow straight in — variants, pricing, passport. No CSV imports, no PIM migration.

items.title: Theme it your way
items.body: The starter is a codebase you own, not a page builder. Edit the theme, swap components, extend the checkout — it's yours.

admin.title: A brilliant admin to manage products.
admin.subtitle: The admin panel is where the storefront meets the atelier OS. Manage products, variants, and passports in one place — with the same data that runs production, inventory, and wholesale.

items.title: Products & variants
items.body: Create, edit, and organise products with full variant support — colour, size, material. Stock and pricing sync to every channel automatically.

items.title: Passport per SKU
items.body: Attach and edit Digital Product Passport data — artisan, material lot, certification — directly on the product. Changes appear on the storefront instantly.

items.title: Orders & fulfilment
items.body: See every order, capture payment, and fulfil from one screen. Returns and exchanges flow back into inventory without re-keying.

integrations.title: Built on a commerce engine you can extend.
integrations.subtitle: The storefront and admin run on Medusa JS — a modular, open-source commerce framework. Ship with the modules you need, customise the framework, and orchestrate flows visually.

items.title: Built on Medusa JS
items.body: A headless, API-first commerce engine. Every entity is a module — extend or replace without forking the core.

items.title: Shipped with Modules
items.body: Cart, checkout, payment, fulfilment, inventory, tax — production-ready modules that work out of the box and swap cleanly.

items.title: Customisable Framework
items.body: Subscribers, workflows, and custom logic hook into the event bus. Build your edge without fighting the framework.

items.title: Visual Flow Editor
items.body: Drag-and-drop workflow builder for automation — reorder logic, add steps, and ship flows without writing code.

items.title: Marketing Inbuilt
items.body: Email campaigns, discounts, and gift cards ship with the engine. Segments and triggers tie back to real purchase data.
